stemHtml: What is correct regarding a typical chemical oxygen system?

options.a: It is controlled by a valve control mechanism, depending on the settings in the cockpit.
options.b: It lasts 12 to 20 minutes, and it can be deactivated by stowing the passenger masks.
options.c: It lasts 60 to 120 minutes, and it cannot be turned off once activated.
options.d: It can not be turned off once activated and lasts until the amount of oxygen is exhausted.
